name: FUREA UERZT
short_description: Race beyond gravity in a fast-paced sci-fi racing experience where every second decides the fate of Earth and Mars.
detailed_description:
Wishlist Now 

FUREA UERZT: Mars Code is a high-stakes sci-fi racing experience where speed is humanity’s last hope.
Race futuristic vehicles across gravity-bending tracks on Mars and push your reflexes to the limit.

Add to your Wishlist and be notified at launch.

Speed Is the Last Hope. Futuristic sci-fi racing across gravity-bending tracks on Mars. When a meteor strike threatens Earth, the race transforms into a mission of survival. As the last guardian racer, you’ll harness futuristic vehicles, activate electromagnetic shields, and unlock quantum teleportation to stop planetary annihilation.

Race Beyond Gravity. Decide Two Worlds. Race across alien terrains, from the chrome labyrinth of Chromium City to the dazzling rings of Ring City, each filled with unique challenges, enemies, and breathtaking sci-fi landscapes. Warp through wormholes, bend gravity, and master shifting tracks where every second demands courage and precision. Racing · Sci-Fi · Speed · Gravity.

Break Gravity. Beat Time. Save Two Worlds.

A high-intensity sci-fi racing adventure built on pure speed. Uncover hidden technologies, rewrite space-time, and prove that racing is more than sport—it’s the key to survival. Prepare for the ultimate ride beyond imagination. Your FUREA UERZT adventure begins now.

Ring City
Only the Fastest Rewrite Destiny. Race futuristic vehicles where every second decides the future.Explore the contrasting and beautiful city of Ring. The race has started. Face enemies from the future, use high speed. Discover! Then, become a winner.

The Future of Quantum Teleportation
A high-stakes sci-fi racing game with futuristic vehicles and gravity-defying tracks. The excitement of racing in the quantum energy generator area and activating the electromagnetic field as a shield.

Begin Your FUREA Adventure today!

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Indonesian, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
